name: Kodak Film Ultra MAX 400
description: Kodak's GC/UltraMax 400 is a high-speed, daylight-balanced, color negative film offering a wide exposure latitude for greater versatility.

features.Key Features :: Daylight-Balanced Color Negative Film | ISO 400/27° in C-41 Process | Rich Saturation, Optimized Skin Tones | Fine Grain, Wide Exposure Latitude
features.What’s In The Box :: Kodak GC/UltraMax 400 Color Negative Film (35mm Roll, 36 Exposures)
